name: threatAssessment
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.assessments.every(function(a){ return Number.isFinite(a.probability) && Number.isFinite(a.impact) && Number.isFinite(a.riskScore) && Number.isFinite(a.residualRisk) && Number.isFinite(a.controlEffectiveness) && Array.isArray(a.mitigations); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'security.threatAssessment'. Drives ThreatVulnPanel.tsx threat-risk card (assessments[].{name,riskLevel,riskScore,residualRisk,controlEffectiveness,mitigations}). Component double-wraps as {artifact:{data:{threats}}} → dispatch peels → handler reads artifact.data.threats. POISON: probability/impact via secFin() clamp to the 1..5 rating band so 'Infinity'/'1e999'/NaN can't leak a non-finite riskScore. Pinned by server/tests/security-lens-macros.test.js.
